name: Folder Size Explorer
shortDescription: A Windows storage analysis tool that shows what is taking space across folders, drives, and file trees.
longDescription: Folder Size Explorer helps Windows users, technicians, and system administrators quickly understand disk usage by scanning folders and showing where storage is being consumed. It is designed to make cleanup decisions easier by highlighting large folders, file groups, and space-heavy areas of the filesystem.

name: Jackery Monitor
shortDescription: A self-hosted Linux monitor for Jackery portable power stations with charts, Kasa smart-plug charging automation, and a local web dashboard.
longDescription: Jackery Monitor is an unofficial self-hosted utility for Jackery portable power stations. It polls the Jackery cloud API, logs readings to CSV or MySQL, controls TP-Link Kasa smart plugs for automated charging, keeps supported device displays awake, and serves a local web dashboard with charts, device controls, configuration, and HTTP API endpoints for home automation.

screenshots.alt: Jackery Monitor dashboard with battery chart, charging controls, device status, and battery drop events.
screenshots.caption: Dashboard with live device state, charge controls, chart history, and charging overlays.

screenshots.alt: Jackery Monitor configuration page with Jackery account settings and per-device options.
screenshots.caption: Runtime configuration for Jackery account credentials, charge thresholds, and screen timeout.

changelog: Initial Linux release is available from the public GitHub repository.
Includes systemd services, web dashboard, Kasa charging automation, MySQL chart storage, and HTTP API endpoints.

name: Permission Preserving File Copier
shortDescription: A Windows file and folder copy tool designed to preserve permissions while using multithreaded copy operations.
longDescription: Permission Preserving File Copier is intended for safer Windows file migrations, backups, and administrative copy jobs. It will focus on copying files and folders while preserving NTFS permissions and improving performance with multithreaded copy capability.
changelog: Initial public release is in development.

name: Windows File Server Permission Auditor
shortDescription: A Windows file server auditing tool for reviewing folder permissions and identifying risky access patterns.
longDescription: Windows File Server Permission Auditor is planned as a tool for administrators who need visibility into NTFS and file share permissions. It will help review access, detect overly broad permissions, and support safer file server management.
changelog: Initial public release is in development.
